## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Motivation or issue reference (e.g., Fixes #123).

## How

Key implementation details, if not obvious from the diff.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested in browser — no console errors
- [ ] Example page added/updated (if adding or changing a widget)
- [ ] CSS follows `.nui-` naming convention
- [ ] Exports updated in category `index.js` (if adding a new module)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots showing the change.
